title: Selling Design Assets with Crypto Payments: What It Actually Is and How It Works — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You've spent hours creating stunning design assets, but PayPal and Stripe won't let you sell them to your Kenyan customers. You've tried other platforms, but they charge exorbitant fees. It's frustrating, especially when you know your designs are in high demand. You need a reliable way to sell your assets without breaking the bank or dealing with restrictive payment processors. In this article, we'll explore how to use crypto payments to take control of your sales and reach a global audience.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Using crypto payments for design assets means you can sell your products directly to customers without relying on intermediaries like PayPal or Stripe. This approach allows you to keep more of the revenue and provides a faster, more secure payment experience for your customers. It's especially important for creators in countries with restrictive payment policies, like Kenya. By embracing crypto payments, you can tap into a global market and build a sustainable business.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind crypto payments is based on blockchain and smart contracts. When a customer makes a purchase, the payment is processed through a decentralized network, ensuring a secure and transparent transaction. The Web3 Wallet Connect plugin ($19.99) from Unchained Commerce makes it easy to integrate this technology into your website. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can create a seamless payment experience for your customers and automate the delivery of your design assets.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This solution is designed for digital creators like graphic designers, UI/UX designers, and artists who want to sell their work directly to customers without relying on traditional payment processors. It's perfect for creators in countries with restrictive payment policies or those who want to reach a global audience. By using crypto payments, you can take control of your sales and build a sustainable business that's not tied to any one payment processor.
Don't be afraid to experiment and learn as you go – with practice, you'll become more confident in your ability to use crypto payments.
The Components That Make It Work Together

To use crypto payments for design assets, you'll need a few key components: a payment processor like NOWPayments, a wallet integration plugin like Web3 Wallet Connect, and a way to deliver your assets automatically. With these components working together, you can create a seamless payment experience for your customers and automate the delivery of your design assets. This approach ensures that both you and your customers have a secure and transparent transaction.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To get started, you'll need to sign up for a NOWPayments account and integrate Web3 Wallet Connect into your website. You'll also need to create a secure way to deliver your design assets automatically. Once you have these components in place, you can start selling your products directly to customers and enjoying the benefits of crypto payments. Don't be afraid to experiment and learn as you go – with practice, you'll become more confident in your ability to use crypto payments to take control of your sales.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Crypto payments offer a faster and more secure payment experience for customers, which can lead to increased sales and customer satisfaction.

Your Action Checklist

To get started with crypto payments for design assets, follow these concrete action steps: 

1. Sign up for a NOWPayments account and integrate Web3 Wallet Connect into your website. 
2. Create a secure way to deliver your design assets automatically. 
3. Choose the design assets you want to sell and set up your pricing. 
4. Promote your products to your target audience and start selling. 
5. Monitor your sales and adjust your strategy as needed to optimize your results.
By embracing crypto payments, you can tap into a global market and build a sustainable business that's not tied to any one payment processor.
